meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve slow development speed (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome slow development speed. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Speed Up Development for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Master AI-driven debugging to eliminate slow development cycles. An advanced checklist for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship faster.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development, integrate AI agents directly into your terminal. Use Claude Code for autonomous refactoring and Antigravity for architectural analysis. By treating AI as a pair programmer that handles stack trace analysis and edge-case testing, you can reduce your debugging overhead by 70% and ship client projects faster.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a cryptic stack trace at 2 AM, the client deadline is looming, and your velocity has hit a brick wall. This is the silent killer of every freelance business: the 'debugging death spiral' where fixing one bug introduces two more. It’s not just frustrating; it’s profit-leaking inefficiency that stunts your growth.

But the era of manual, line-by-line debugging is over. By weaponizing AI agents like Claude Code and Antigravity, you transform your terminal into a high-octane engine for resolution. This isn't just about finding errors; it's about shifting your role from 'code fixer' to 'architect of high-velocity systems.'

steps.title: Contextualize the Environment
steps.description: Before debugging, ensure the AI understands your specific tech stack and project constraints to prevent hallucinatory fixes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project structure and identify the core dependency graph. List potential bottlenecks in this specific architecture.

steps.title: Automated Trace Analysis
steps.description: Feed the error logs directly into the agent to identify the root cause rather than guessing based on symptom behavior.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this stack trace: [PASTE TRACE]. Identify the exact function and state transition that triggered the failure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file debug_log.txt --task 'identify root cause of this error'

steps.title: Hypothesis-Driven Refactoring
steps.description: Instruct the agent to propose a fix based on defensive programming patterns rather than quick patches.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a refactor for the identified module that enforces type safety and prevents this specific null-pointer exception.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply --plan 'refactor module for type safety'

steps.title: Regression Testing Generation
steps.description: Ensure the fix doesn't break existing functionality by generating automated tests before applying the patch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of unit tests for the refactored module that covers edge cases identified in the failure log.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'generate unit tests for the recent changes'

steps.title: Final Verification & Cleanup
steps.description: Verify the implementation against the original requirements and prune any temporary debug code injected during the process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the final changes and verify they adhere to clean code standards and project documentation.

pro_tips: Always use the '--plan' flag in Claude Code to review the agent's logic before it touches your filesystem.
Maintain a 'system_prompt.md' in your root folder to force the AI to follow your specific coding style consistently.
Use Antigravity to map your API surface area; this prevents 'side-effect' bugs when modifying shared state.
Never blindly accept a fix; ask the agent to explain the complexity impact of the change on existing performance.
Pipe your terminal history into the AI at the end of the day to identify recurring patterns in your own coding mistakes.
content.next_steps: Integrate these agents into your CI/CD pipeline as a 'pre-commit' hook to catch bugs before they ever reach your production environment.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your codebase and start mastering it. Unlock the full potential of your development workflow and reclaim your evenings. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
